response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided Japanese lyrics for the song segment. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics were fully utilized for the musical performance. Manual transcription and translation were performed for the intro and outro dialogue, cross-referenced with burnt-in subtitles. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal starts. Transitions are kept instantaneous during the fast-paced song to prevent cascading delays. Dialogue is segmented to match natural conversational flow.

subtitles.original: ただ、イナと歌うのは楽しいけど、
subtitles.english: But then, singing with her is fun,

subtitles.original: キアラと歌ってもなあ...
subtitles.english: but with you...

subtitles.original: それどういう意味？
subtitles.english: With me, what?

subtitles.original: 私の歌じゃダメってこと？
subtitles.english: You don't think I'm good enough for you?!

subtitles.original: やってやろうじゃないの！ほら、さっさと歌うよ！
subtitles.english: Let's go, punk! You and me, right now!

subtitles.original: 全部 全部 アンタのせいだ
subtitles.english: It's all, all your fault

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいにウザったいわ
subtitles.english: It's so annoying I could vomit

subtitles.original: 何かに縋って諂って
subtitles.english: Clinging to something, flattering

subtitles.original: 期待したアタシが馬鹿だった
subtitles.english: I was a fool for having expectations

subtitles.original: ご機嫌伺いの八方美人
subtitles.english: A people-pleaser currying favor

subtitles.original: それ故にアンチな一生Gimme
subtitles.english: So gimme a lifetime of being an anti

subtitles.original: 浅いキャパシティ まいどおおきに
subtitles.english: Shallow capacity, thanks as always

subtitles.original: つまるとこ 人生ずっと地味
subtitles.english: In the end, life is just plain

subtitles.original: ｢憎たらしい! ｣｢痛々しい! ｣
subtitles.english: “How hateful!” “How pitiful!”

subtitles.original: 無視出来ないのが一層
subtitles.english: It’s even more...

subtitles.original: 腹立たしい 苛立たしい
subtitles.english: ...enraging and irritating that I can't ignore it

subtitles.original: そろそろ飽きた 自画自賛に
subtitles.english: I'm getting tired of your self-praise

subtitles.original: (Look around!!)
subtitles.english: (Look around!!)

subtitles.original: ライクの反対はアパシー
subtitles.english: The opposite of like is apathy

subtitles.original: ≒ 繋がれた証
subtitles.english: ≒ Proof of being connected

subtitles.original: 切り離せない関係
subtitles.english: A relationship that can't be severed

subtitles.original: 逸らしてしまいたいわ
subtitles.english: I just want to turn away

subtitles.original: これは所謂 ヘイトスピーチ
subtitles.english: This is what they call hate speech

subtitles.original: 匿名性の声明を
subtitles.english: Putting a declaration of anonymity...

subtitles.original: 生命に載せてんだ
subtitles.english: ...on my very life

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まないサイレン
subtitles.english: The siren that won't stop ringing

subtitles.original: 近づく度に痙攣
subtitles.english: Spasms every time it gets closer

subtitles.original: 赤信号にずっと従順です。
subtitles.english: Always obedient to the red light.

subtitles.original: 大体 アナタのコト アタシ
subtitles.english: Generally, when it comes to you,

subtitles.original: ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
subtitles.english: I HATE HATE HATE HATE HATE you

subtitles.original: Omg 情けない 最早
subtitles.english: Omg, how miserable, at this point

subtitles.original: バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: I want to say BYE-BYE-BYE-BYE-BYE

subtitles.original: 脳内も予測不能 故に
subtitles.english: Even my brain is unpredictable, hence

subtitles.original: 解解解解解は無い
subtitles.english: There is NO NO NO NO NO solution

subtitles.original: どうだい? アタシのコト アナタ
subtitles.english: How about it? Do you...

subtitles.original: ダイダイダイダイダイキライになった?
subtitles.english: ...HATE HATE HATE HATE HATE me now?

subtitles.original: あァ 百害あって一利ナシ
subtitles.english: Ah, all harm and no benefit

subtitles.original: nothing not see
subtitles.english: nothing not see

subtitles.original: もしタラレバ並べてもニコチンだし
subtitles.english: Even if I stack up 'what-ifs,' it's just nicotine

subtitles.original: I miss youって近付いた結末は
subtitles.english: The end of getting close saying 'I miss you' is...

subtitles.original: 凡ミス 凡ミス
subtitles.english: ...a careless mistake, a careless mistake

subtitles.original: センキュー 反面教師
subtitles.english: Thank you, bad example

subtitles.original: 後味 一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: The aftertaste will never disappear

subtitles.original: よしよし いい子ね
subtitles.english: There, there, good child

subtitles.original: 笑顔振り撒き パラパラ いい子ね
subtitles.english: Scattering smiles, a good child

subtitles.original: だけど だけど その本性は?
subtitles.english: But, but, what's your true nature?

subtitles.original: 善悪の区別も付かないの? 笑 はぁ。
subtitles.english: Can't you tell good from evil? Lol. Sigh.

subtitles.original: 減点方式で取り巻く環境に巻かれて
subtitles.english: Swept up in an environment of demerit points

subtitles.original: 生涯、痛い! 痛い! 痛い! も聞かれないわ! って
subtitles.english: I won't even hear 'it hurts! it hurts! it hurts!' in my life

subtitles.original: 当然の報いにクラっちゃった
subtitles.english: I got hit by the natural consequences

subtitles.original: 人は鏡なんです
subtitles.english: People are mirrors

subtitles.original: 実のところ 依存は両辺です
subtitles.english: Actually, dependence is on both sides

subtitles.original: シャットダウンしても付き纏う
subtitles.english: It haunts me even if I shut down

subtitles.original: 己の弱さが不甲斐ない
subtitles.english: My own weakness is pathetic

subtitles.original: 全部 全部 アンタのせいって
subtitles.english: Saying it's all, all your fault

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいに止まんないわ
subtitles.english: It won't stop, to the point of vomiting

subtitles.original: いっその事 切り離せた方が楽なのにな
subtitles.english: It would be easier if I could just cut it off

subtitles.original: 後味 一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: The aftertaste will never disappear

subtitles.original: はァ、もう、誰なの？
subtitles.english: Sigh, who is it now?

subtitles.original: はい...
subtitles.english: Come in.

subtitles.original: アーニャ、ヤッホー！
subtitles.english: Hey Anya, ya doing okay?

subtitles.original: って、大丈夫そう？
subtitles.english: Wait, are you okay?

subtitles.original: なんか顔色悪いね。
subtitles.english: You look kind of... not great.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫...じゃないかもね。
subtitles.english: Thanks... maybe not.

subtitles.original: ちょっと横になったほうがいいんじゃない？
subtitles.english: You just need sleep!

subtitles.original: 周りをぐるぐる走ってあげるから、
subtitles.english: Lie down, and I'll run in circles...

subtitles.original: わための数を数えるといいよ！
subtitles.english: ...so you can count me~

subtitles.original: 心配かけてごめん、でも今は寝たらダメんだ。
subtitles.english: Sorry, but not now.

subtitles.original: なぜなら、あともうちょっとでこの事件を解決できそうなんだから！
subtitles.english: I'm close to cracking this case wide open!

subtitles.original: そお？
subtitles.english: You sure?

subtitles.original: そうかも、そうじゃないかも。
subtitles.english: I don't know! Yes? Maybe?

subtitles.original: わかんないけど、とりあえずヒントは揃ったんだ。
subtitles.english: I do have all the hints...

subtitles.original: ほな、難しいか。
subtitles.english: That doesn't seem very sure...

subtitles.original: わため先輩、ほどほどにしておきましょう。
subtitles.english: Watame-senpai, I think you're annoying her.

subtitles.original: わためは悪くないよねぇ？
subtitles.english: Watame did nothing wrong.

subtitles.original: これが事件を解く鍵なんだ。
subtitles.english: This is an important clue!

subtitles.original: 探偵の直感がそう言ってる。
subtitles.english: I can feel it in my gut,

subtitles.original: でもDNA鑑定では何もわからなかった。
subtitles.english: ...but a DNA trace was a dead end.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、これは何なんだ？これは何なんだ？！
subtitles.english: So what does it mean? What does it mean?!

subtitles.original: その布でそんなにお困りなら...
subtitles.english: If you're so troubled by that cloth...

subtitles.original: あ、じゃあ、わためが食べてあげる！
subtitles.english: Oh! I could eat it.

subtitles.original: ねぇアーニャ、それちょっと見せてくれる？
subtitles.english: Hey Anya? Can I take a look at that?

subtitles.original: この布についてわかったことはあるけど...
subtitles.english: If I tell you something about this cloth,

subtitles.original: それを教えたら、ちょっと休憩しない？
subtitles.english: will you agree to take a break?

subtitles.original: 一旦仕事の手は止めて、私達と遊ぼうよ。
subtitles.english: Maybe do something fun with us before you go back to work?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、一緒に歌でも歌う？
subtitles.english: We could sing together.

subtitles.original: この街では、情報は歌で買うものみたいだし。
subtitles.english: That seems to be the going rate for information around here.

subtitles.original: お、楽しそう！
subtitles.english: Oh, that sounds fun!

subtitles.original: オッケー。
subtitles.english: Alright...

subtitles.original: その布には、魔力の痕跡を感じるんだ。
subtitles.english: ...I can sense a magical residue on this cloth.
